content.name: Churchill Downs Inc - Turfway Park + Newport Racing & Gaming

duties.label: Information Gathering and Organization
duties.description: Produced scheduled reports and other documentation (SOPs, Asset Inventory updates / audits, Knowledge base contributions, etc.) as requested by the Sr. Director of IT.

duties.label: Network Administration
duties.description: Managed and configured Cisco enterprise switches (Setup / modified VLANs via SSH / Putty, performed tasks using Cisco Call-Manager, etc.). Created and modified existing DHCP reservations from Windows Server DHCP Server application.

duties.label: Incident Resolution and Root-cause Analysis
duties.description: Provided hardware and software maintenance, configuration & repair of a wide range of mobile devices, POS terminals, kiosks, personal computers, workstations, and more.

duties.label: Remote Access and Virtual-Machine Management & Administration
duties.description: RDP, vSphere, EV Reach, SecureLink, etc.

duties.label: POS Administration
duties.description: Oracle Micros / EMC / Symphony experience which includes POS imaging, configuration, calibration, repair, and administration.

duties.label: Site-Access and Identity Verification App Administration
duties.description: Performed tasks related to access provisioning and de-provisioning for applications such as iTrak, VeriDocs, KeyWatcher, etc.

duties.label: Gaming-Application Administration
duties.description: Provisioned and de-provisioned access, managed permissions / groups, and configured applications such as Oasis 360, Oasis Loyalty, Everi apps (Trilogy, CashClub, Xchange Explorer, XView, etc.), Adept Mobile Dispatch System, etc.

duties.label: Financial Transaction & Compliance Application Administration
duties.description: Provisioned and de-provisioned access, managed permissions / groups, and configured applications such as FABICash / FABITrack, Glory ATM / Cash-Recycler kiosk management, etc.

duties.label: Business / Enterprise Application Administration
duties.description: Provisioned and de-provisioned access, managed permissions / groups, and configured applications such as Microsoft M365, Microsoft Exchange, Ivanti MobileIron, etc.

duties.label: Process Design and System Engineering
duties.description:
Designed and implemented the processes, systems and infrastructure necessary to support the client (IRS - Criminal Investigation Division) and fulfill the following contract requirements: 
 - Establish an 'Imaging Depot' with the capacity to process up to 120 laptops per day (built from the ground up). 
 - Produce detailed documentation, reports, and resource material (ie. SOPs, knowledge-base materials, etc.) for a variety of operational initiatives. 
 - Optimize and improve asset management systems and processes related to device inventorying, acquisition, and order fulfillment timelines.

duties.label: System / Endpoint Administration
duties.description: Built, Tested, and Deployed Windows 10/11 Images for a variety hardware models using Microsoft SCCM (MECM / Intune).

duties.label: Security Baseline Enforcement and Vulnerability Remediation / Patching
duties.description: Enforced system security-policy compliance within a large network consisting of thousands of endpoints using tools such as HCL BigFix, Tenable, CyberArk, and Forescout.

duties.label: Application Testing and System Integration (CI/CD)
duties.description: Coordinated daily with System Administrators and Testing-Team members to conduct application/software package testing to ensure compatibility with the overall system image in production or development at the time.
Coordinated personnel, responded to production issues, and assigned tasks to ensure department productivity goals were met or exceeded
Operated and maintained large high speed, 5-axis CNC machines.
Assembled and performed quality control inspection of optical lenses & eyewear.
Experience using precision optical measurement tools.
Collected and analyzed data regarding product quality and the production rates of the department(s).
Executed other specific tasks designated by a supervisor or manager.
